nasb.text: “Bring the one who has cursed outside the camp, and let all who heard him lay their hands on his head; then let all the congregation stone him.

esv.text: “Bring out of the camp the one who cursed, and let all who heard him lay their hands on his head, and let all the congregation stone him.

cnv.text: “把那咒詛聖名的人拉出營外，聽見的人都按手在他頭上。然後全體會眾要扔石頭打死他。

ccb.text: “把那亵渎圣名的人带到营外，叫听见的人把手放在他头上，然后全体会众要用石头打死他。
